Baggage Policy

We did the math.

Every Indian leaving India carries at least 3 bags. We didn't fight it. We just… designed for it.

0
kg checked baggage
+
0
kg cabin baggage
=
😮‍💨
finally. relief.

*Allowed: Your mum's pickles, snacks, and all the "just in case" items you packed.

Overhead Storage

Every airline says
"One cabin bag only."
Every passenger shows up
with at least three.

So we stopped fighting it. DistaAir introduces extra overhead storage — purpose-built for travellers who never pack light. Because packing light was never really an option, was it?

A350 Fleet

The Airbus A350.
Nothing less.

We fly top-of-the-line A350 aircraft. Wide-body, long-haul, built for comfort. Because if you are travelling that far — to family, to home, to a new chapter — at least the plane should be comfortable. And safe. Very safe.

Butter Chicken at 35,000 ft.
Because why not.

In-flight Dining

Not a sad bread roll.
An actual meal.

We know you packed Bhujia in your carry-on. We respect that. But DistaAir will also serve you a proper Indian thali — dal, sabzi, rice, roti. The works. At 35,000 feet.

No more choosing between a cheese sandwich and a cheese sandwich.

Because journeys to India
are different.

And a little bit of home packed in every suitcase.

🎉 April Fools — But Also…

DistaAir isn't real.
Dista very much is.

Bringing India closer.
One flight order at a time.

We don't fly planes. But we do ship authentic Indian products to 30+ countries worldwide — with the same obsession over what NRIs actually need. Real Ayurveda. Real snacks. Real prices. Direct from India.

No spam. Just India in a box, shipped to you.

Our Mission

Our mission has always
been the same.

To bring India closer to everyone across the globe. From Indian products to Indian brands — trusted Ayurveda to delicious Indian food — we make it easy to find authentic Indian products and deliver them to you, wherever you are.

You might not need
a flight to India.

Just Dista it.
